# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "128Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "256Mi"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: frontend
        image: frontend:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: frontend

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8080,9090"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "3306"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: backend-api
        image: backend-api:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        - containerPort: 9090
          name: grpc
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090
    protocol: TCP
    name: grpc
  selector:
    app: backend-api

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "debug"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          tracing:
            zipkin:
              address: zipkin.istio-system:9411
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: auth
        image: auth-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        env:
        - name: JWT_SECRET
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: auth-secrets
              key: jwt-secret
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: auth
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: auth

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/interceptionMode: "REDIRECT"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundIPRanges: "10.0.0.0/8"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: payment
        image: payment-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 250m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 750m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: payment
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: payment

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/componentLogLevel: "ext_authz:trace,filter:debug"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: notification
        image: notification-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 150m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 400m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: notification

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: database-proxy
        image: database-proxy:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3306
          name: mysql
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 256Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 3306
    targetPort: 3306
    protocol: TCP
    name: mysql
  selector:
    app: database-proxy

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: analytics
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: analytics
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/statsInclusionPrefixes: "cluster.outbound,cluster_manager,listener_manager,http_mixer_filter,tcp_mixer_filter,server,cluster.xds-grpc"
        sidecar.istio.io/holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: analytics
        image: analytics-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 1000m
            memory: 2Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: analytics-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: analytics
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: analytics

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: cache
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: cache
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 512Mi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: cache-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    protocol: TCP
    name: redis
  selector:
    app: cache

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: search-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: search
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: search
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: search
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/userVolume: '[{"name":"custom-certs","secret":{"secretName":"search-certs"}}]'
        sidecar.istio.io/userVolumeMount: '[{"name":"custom-certs","mountPath":"/etc/certs","readonly":true}]'
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: search
        image: search-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 250m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 750m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: search-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: search
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: search

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: recommendation-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: recommendation
    version: v1
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: recommendation
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: recommendation
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/statusPort: "15020"
        sidecar.istio.io/enableCoreDump: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: recommendation
        image: recommendation-service:v1
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: http
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 600m
            memory: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: recommendation-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: recommendation
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
  selector:
    app: recommendation
